dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4593 IS: Detention Authority Clarification Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Budd (for himself, Mr. Scott of South Carolina, Mr. Cornyn, Mr. Graham, and Mrs. Blackburn) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend title II of the Immigration and Nationality Act to require mandatory detention of aliens who are physically present in the United States, but have not been admitted to the United States.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Detention Authority Clarification Act.

section.header: Inspection and detention of certain aliens

subsection.text: Section 235(b)(2)(A) of the Immigration and Nationality Act (8 U.S.C. 1225(b)(2)(A)) is amended by striking an alien seeking admission and inserting the applicant for admission.
Section 236(c)(1) of the Immigration and Nationality Act (8 U.S.C. 1226(c)(1)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in each of subparagraphs (A), (B), and (C), by striking the comma at the end and inserting a semicolon;
in subparagraph (D), by striking , or at the end and inserting a semicolon;
in subparagraph (E)(ii), by striking the comma at the end and inserting ; or; and
by inserting after subparagraph (E) the following:

subparagraph.text: is an applicant for admission described in section 235(a)(1),
